## Scope check

Bosun has a deliberate scope. Before filing, please skim:

- `SPEC.md` — what's in v0.1
- `docs/v0.2-deferred.md` — what was deliberately not done
- Recent `docs/v0.*-roadmap.md` for the version trajectory

Does this fit the project's shape, or is it asking bosun to grow
into a different tool? Both are valid filings; just be honest about
which.

<!-- Workarounds, other tools, things you tried before reaching for this. -->
